title: oenothera longissima subsp. typica
intro: Oenothera longissima subsp. typica, also known as evening primrose, is a plant species that belongs to the evening primrose family (Onagraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which are rich in gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an essential fatty acid with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oenothera longissima subsp. typica include reducing inflammation, alleviating symptoms of menopause, and supporting skin health, among others. Herbal preparations of the plant include oil extracts and capsules, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
